content.description: Renders notes as compact markdown body (content.description only) for embedding in app pages. Used via per-attachment viewId override, not as the default note view.
content.hob:
;; Note Widget View — renders notes as compact markdown body for app-page embedding

(let [body (or (get-in item [:content :description]) "")]
  [:div {:style "line-height: 1.5;"}
    (if (seq body)
      (render-markdown body)
      "")])
